issues.description: Condition missing: 'If your opponent has a Character with 5000 or more power' is not represented. Current condition is 'Always', but should check opponent's board state.

Duration 'EndOfTurn' is incorrect. Card text states 'during this turn' which maps to 'DuringYourTurn', not a temporary effect that expires at end of turn. Since Rush persists for the remainder of the turn, duration should be 'DuringYourTurn'.
